debug_info.goal:
M : Type u_1
k : Type u_4
inst✝² : AddCommMonoid M
inst✝¹ : Field k
inst✝ : IsAlgClosed k
I : Ideal (AddMonoidAlgebra k M)
G : Type u_1 := AddLocalization ⊤
left✝ : I.IsPrime
s : Set (M × M)
hsI :
  Ideal.span
      ((fun x =>
          @AddMonoidAlgebra.isToricIdeal_iff_exists_span_single_sub_single.match_1 M (fun x => AddMonoidAlgebra k M) x
            fun a b => single a 1 - single b 1) ''
        s) =
    I
V : Scheme := Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M ⧸ I, commRing := Ideal.Quotient.commRing I }
this✝ : V.Over (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing }) := sorry
this : (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k G, commRing := commRing }).Over
  (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing }) :=
  sorry
VinterT : Scheme :=
  pullback (V ↘ Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing })
    (Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k G, commRing := commRing } ↘
      Spec { carrier := AddMonoidAlgebra k M, commRing := commRing })
⊢ ∃ s,
    @AddMonoidAlgebra.monoidIdeal M (AddLocalization ⊤) k inst✝² Algebra.GrothendieckAddGroup.instAddCommGroup
        (AddLocalization.addMonoidOf ⊤) s.toAddSubmonoid Field.toEuclideanDomain.toCommRing =
      I

let f := AddLocalization.addMonoidOf (⊤ : AddSubmonoid M); refine ⟨{ carrier := { g | ∃ a b, f a - f b = g ∧ single a 1 - single b 1 ∈ I }, zero_mem' := ⟨0, 0, rfl, I.zero_mem⟩, add_mem' := by rintro _ _ ⟨a, b, rfl, ha⟩ ⟨c, d, rfl, hc⟩; exact ⟨a + c, b + d, by simp [add_sub_add_comm], by simpa [mul_sub, sub_mul, ← single_add] using I.add_mem (I.mul_mem_left (single c 1) ha) (I.mul_mem_right (single b 1) hc)⟩, neg_mem' := by rintro _ ⟨a, b, rfl, h⟩; exact ⟨b, a, by simp, I.neg_mem h⟩ }, le_antisymm (Ideal.span_le.2 <| by rintro _ ⟨⟨a, b⟩, ⟨a', b', h, h'⟩, rfl⟩; obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := f.exists_of_eq (by simpa [sub_eq_sub_iff_add_eq_add] using h); apply left✝.mem_of_mul_mem_left (x := single (b' + c) 1); · simpa [mul_sub, ← single_add, add_comm, hc] using I.mul_mem_left (single (b + c) 1) h'; · intro h0; have hI : Ideal.map (AddMonoidAlgebra.liftNC (RingHom.id k) (1 : Multiplicative M →* k) (fun _ _ ↦ mul_comm _ _)) I = ⊥ := by rw [← hsI, Ideal.map_span, Ideal.span_eq_bot]; rintro _ ⟨p, _, rfl⟩; simp; exact one_ne_zero (by simpa [hI] using Ideal.mem_map_of_mem (AddMonoidAlgebra.liftNC (RingHom.id k) (1 : Multiplicative M →* k) (fun _ _ ↦ mul_comm _ _)) h0)) (hsI ▸ Ideal.span_le.2 <| by rintro _ ⟨p, hp, rfl⟩; exact ⟨p.1, p.2, rfl, hsI ▸ Ideal.subset_span (Set.mem_image_of_mem _ hp)⟩)⟩
